steps: 0.5 µL of entry Vector (15 ng/ μL)
Add 2 µL - 5 µL of each assembly reaction to 50 µL competent cells.
Cells should be recovered for 01:00:00 (Amp) to 02:00:00 (Kan, Chloramphenicol).
